John Oram

GitHub LinkedIn

I am a software developer based in Victoria, British Columbia, with over a decade of experience designing and building secure, scalable, and resilient software systems.

I work across the full stack—from backend infrastructure and cloud orchestration to user-facing applications—focusing on performance, reliability, and maintainability.

I stay active in the Victoria tech community, and I enjoy mentoring and sharing ideas with other developers.

I also founded VeilStream, a platform that provides per-branch environments to help teams automate preview deployments and streamline their path from code to production.

Career Journey
January 2010 – November 2012 Minionworks Games Game Developer
November 2012 – July 2015 Socoloco Full Stack Web Developer
July 2015 – January 2016 Socoloco Lead Web Developer
January 2016 – July 2017 Sendwithus/Dyspatch Backend Developer
July 2017 – April 2019 Sendwithus/Dyspatch Backend Team Lead
August 2019 – October 2019 Tutela Senior DevOps
October 2019 – August 2020 Tutela Lead DevOps
August 2020 – June 2022 Certn Senior Backend Developer
June 2022 – June 2023 Certn Staff Engineer/Developer
September 2023 – May 2024 Intlabs Senior Full Stack Developer
May 2024 – Today VeilStream Co-founder / CTO
